mapper.select: select count(*) from bio_task_dtl_tb where instance_id in (select DISTINCT instance_id from flow_task_actor_tb where actor_id = #{applyUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and task_category=#{taskCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select count(*) from bio_task_dtl_tb where instance_id in (select DISTINCT instance_id from flow_his_commit_tb where create_id = #{applyUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) and task_category=#{taskCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select distinct apply_user_id ,apply_user_name from bio_task_dtl_tb
and task_category=#{taskCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select
from bio_task_dtl_tb where apply_user_id = #{applyUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND instance_id is null order by id desc
